'''Jedi''' was the name of [[Valara Saar]]'s second pet [[Duuvhal]].

[[Force Adept]] Valara Saar had left Yashuvhu to try to become a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but then found the Order too restrictive for her. She was then accompanied by her first pet Duuvhal, [[Zeev]]

After the violent death of Zeev on the planet [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]], Valara Saar decided to stop wandering through the galaxy to return to her native world of [[Yashuvhu/Legends|Yashuvhu]]. There, she took a second pet Duuvhal, to whom she called Jedi. She would became a Prophetess, a Jedi teacher and a defender of her people from her hut in the [[Yashaka Mountains]].
